data.title: Harden web_search egress: catch fragmented exfil + PII (post-MVP)

data.body: Discovered in NAVI-5 review. Current _egress_check (broker.py) is a backstop: blocks single tokens >=40 chars, sk-/AKIA/JWT/long-hex patterns, and length>512. GAP: sensitive data fragmented across many short words (each <40 chars, total <512) slips through; PII (emails/SSNs) not detected (TODO in code). Spec §6.2 frames egress as a backstop, so acceptable for MVP. Post-MVP: add entropy/aggregate-length heuristics + PII patterns; consider denying queries that echo large verbatim spans from run context.
